runners.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when eighth (26.15) at this track. Looks a key chance here on best and given another chance.

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a slick early split last time and went on to clock 19.27 as a strongly fancied winner over 350m at Healesville. In form and is right in the mix again.

runners.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (22.33) at this track over 390m. Coming out of a very strong form race. Can feature with the right run.
